zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de Basset於1180年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾維可姆時，她的父親Sir Alan Basset25歲，母親Aline de Gai21歲。她於1205年與Drew de Montague在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾維可姆 馬希結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1224年在英國巴金哈姆爾享年44歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Basset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from a diminutive of Old French bas(se) ‘short, of low stature’ (see Bas ).
English: variant of   Bassett  , a cognate of 1 above.
In some cases also an altered form of French Besset (see Bessette 2). Compare Bassette 1.

variants.name: Bas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Mauricio, Abelardo, Florencio, Francisco, Jorge, Luis, Manuel, Pedro, Soledad, Vicente.  Eastern Slavic Dmytro, Liya, Pyotr, Sergey.
Catalan: habitational name from a place so named in the district of La Garrotxa, Catalonia.
Basque: topographic name for someone who lived by a wood, from baso ‘wood, forest’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de Basset was born in 1180, in Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England, her father, Sir Alan Basset, was 25 and her mother, Aline de Gai, was 21. She married Drew de Montague in 1205, in Wycombe Marsh, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1224, in Buckinghamshire, England, at the age of 44.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice de Bassetが1180年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアウイコンベで生まれた時，父Sir Alan Bassetは25歳，母Aline de Gaiは21歳であった。1205年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアウイコンベ マーッシュでDrew de Montagueと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1224年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアで44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Basset(이)가 1180년 영국 벅잉함실르 윈이코브에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Alan Basset(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Aline de Gai(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1205년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 윈이코브 마시에서 Drew de Montague(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1224년 영국 벅잉함실르에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de Basset родилась в 1180 г. в местности викомб, буккингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Alan Basset было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Aline de Gai, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Drew de Montague в 1205 г. в местности викомб марш, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1224 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 44 лет.
